vercelLinkage.notes: Connect Vercel project to GitHub repo after repo created

lastProductionDeploy.notes: Local HEAD 3ce6dfc not on production. Pre-/operations build live.

deploymentTimeline.summary: Production route check: all /operations/* returned 404 or error
Autonomous pipeline scripts + GH workflow + /operations/deployment committed locally

pipelineBlockers: BLOCKER-1: GitHub repo osminoog09-star/aion-com does not exist — one-time create required
BLOCKER-2: Vercel CLI auth not available in agent — one-time npx vercel login OR VERCEL_TOKEN secret

ownerUnblock.stepA_github: Create empty repo https://github.com/new?name=aion-com&owner=osminoog09-star — NO README, NO .gitignore, NO license
ownerUnblock.stepB_push: cd aion-com && git push -u origin master
ownerUnblock.stepC_vercel: Vercel → aion-com → Settings → Git → Connect osminoog09-star/aion-com, Production branch master
ownerUnblock.stepE_alt: OR: npx vercel login && npm run deploy:pipeline

autonomousRecovery: After stepA+B: git push triggers vercel-production.yml (if secrets set)
npm run deploy:validate after any deploy
npm run deploy:pipeline for CLI path
